0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","h1",null,{"children":"Hybrid Search"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne's flagship retrieval capability — combining dense vector similarity with SQLite FTS5 full-text search for results that are both semantically relevant and precisely matched."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Why Hybrid?"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Approach"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Strengths"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Weaknesses"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Vector only"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Semantic similarity, fuzzy matching"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Misses exact terms, no boolean logic"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Text only"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Exact matching, boolean queries"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"No semantic understanding, synonym blind"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Hybrid"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Best of both"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Slightly higher latency"}]}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Fusion Algorithm"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"recall()"}]," method performs hybrid search internally using a fixed scoring formula:"]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Step 1: Weighted combination of scores\nbase_score = (vector_score * 0.5) +\n           (fts_score * 0.3) +\n           (importance * 0.2)\n\n# Step 2: Apply recency decay\nfinal_score = base_score * (0.7 + 0.3 * recency_decay)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"The weights are fixed:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Vector"}],": 0.5 (semantic similarity via BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5, 384 dims)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"FTS5"}],": 0.3 (BM25 text relevance)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Importance"}],": 0.2 (memory importance rating, 0.0–1.0)"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["The recency decay uses an exponential half-life (default 168 hours / 7 days, configurable via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_RECENCY_HALFLIFE"}],")."]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Usage"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne()\n\n# recall() performs hybrid search by default\n# It accepts only query and top_k — no weight overrides\nresults = mem.recall(\"What database does the project use?\", top_k=5)\n\nfor r in results:\n  print(f\"Score: {r['score']:.3f}\")\n  print(f\"  Content: {r['content'][:100]}\")\n  print(f\"  Source: {r['source']}\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Result Format"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"[\n  {\n      \"id\": \"mem_abc123\",\n      \"content\": \"We decided to use PostgreSQL for the primary database...\",\n      \"score\": 0.92,\n      \"source\": \"decision\",\n      \"importance\": 0.8,\n      \"created_at\": 1714060800,\n  },\n  ...\n]\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Working Memory Retrieval"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"When searching Working Memory (recent, non-consolidated entries), a keyword-based fallback is used with different weights than the episodic formula. This handles the case where vector embeddings may not yet be available for very recent entries."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Performance"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Query Type"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Median Latency"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"p99 Latency"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Vector only"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"35ms"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"120ms"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"FTS5 only"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"15ms"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"45ms"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Hybrid (default)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"65ms"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"180ms"}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":"$L3"}]],["$L4"],"$L5"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"2dQ5KqP-HsPKzUBBlSLdX"}
3:["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L6",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Index Requirements"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Hybrid search requires both vector and FTS5 indices to be built. These are created automatically on first use. Initial index build may take a few seconds for large datasets."}]}]]}]]}]
